name: moveout-shield-landlord
description: Landlord-side companion to MoveOut Shield. Portfolio management, independent inspection capture with photos and PDF export, tenant bundle import, and 2- or 3-way comparison.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
